mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.role_id, a.permission_id, b.name AS perm_name, b.number AS perm_number FROM t_sys_role_perms a LEFT JOIN t_sys_permission b ON b.id = a.permission_id WHERE a.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_sys_role_perms (id, role_id, permission_id, create_time, create_user) VALUES
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.roleId}, #{entity.permissionId}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.createUser})
